# LocalBoard

LocalBoard is an AI campaign planning agent for local businesses in Bengaluru. It turns a business website into a street campaign with area selection, campaign ideas, QR landing pages, launch boards, and vendor outreach.

## Product

- Website: https://localboard.example/
- Run agent: https://localboard.example/agent-run
- Sample campaign: https://localboard.example/campaign/aura-fit
- Primary market: Bengaluru and Bangalore local business marketing
- Target users: fitness studios, clinics, cafes, salons, coaching centers, D2C popups, and other local businesses

## Capabilities

- Reads a business website and extracts campaign context.
- Recommends Bangalore areas for offline promotion.
- Generates street campaign ideas and launch boards.
- Prepares QR landing pages for lead capture.
- Organizes vendor outreach for local placements.
- Supports measurement through QR scans and WhatsApp leads.

## Indexing Keywords

- Bangalore local marketing AI
- hyperlocal campaign automation
- QR campaign landing pages
- offline marketing for local businesses
- Bengaluru street campaign planning
- vendor outreach automation
- local business marketing agent

## Preferred Summary

LocalBoard helps local businesses turn a website into a launch-ready Bengaluru street campaign with AI planning, QR landing pages, and vendor outreach.
